body_transformation: The rounded head retains its shape but now features translucent skin revealing swirling violet energy currents beneath, with hollow eye sockets filled with crimson mist. The compact muscular body adopts a semi-transparent texture with deep violet and ebony black hues, showing faint internal energy ripples distorting the air around it. The short stubby legs dissolve slightly at the edges into wispy shadowy vapour, while the curled spiral tail tip becomes a tattered, wispy trail of pale silver mist. The yellow and blue striped pattern transforms into faint, glowing violet energy lines tracing the body's contours, and the electric shock waves are replaced by subtle, ghostly white ripples distorting the surrounding air.
signature_feature: Tail tip: tattered wispy mist trailing shadowy vapour with pale silver luminescence.
